programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Maximum Overload
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Symptoms!
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic plays Cyrano to bring Robotnik Jr. and Breezie together. The problem is, Breezie's crazy about Sonic. So Sonic gets out of the way, but when he does, Junior is captured by Robotnik, and Breezie comes to the rescue, finally falling for him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Tails invents a Hover-Hanglider for Sonic's birthday, Sonic suggests he assist Prof. Von Schlemmer with his new Robotnik-Nabber machine. Robotnik hears about this, and poses as Von Schlemmer to trick Tails into inventing a Sonic-Nabber instead.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik lures Sonic into a round-the-planet vehicle race called the Mobius 5000 by threatening to foreclose on a loan to an orphanage.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Scratch and Grounder fiddle with Robotnik's Warpinating Warpifier and send Sonic and Tails into the world of a Mobius Fairy Tales book.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma escapes again from the Mobius Home for Really Bizarre People, disowns Robotnik for failing to capture Sonic, then with the help of an obscure Mobius law, adopts Sonic!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Blakk has hired Brutale - a thug as brutal as his name - to build a Deep Water Rig to drill for Dark Water at the bottom of the Cavern Sea. Needing some water-breathing labor for the job, Brutale steals Marvolio Drake's reptilian pirate crew. Desperate to get his men back, Drake forms an unlikely alliance with the Shane Gang, who are just as desperate to shut the Dark Water rig down.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Using some stolen Shadow Clan tech, Dana Por is able slip in and out of any cavern in Slugterra - and rob them blind! But when she makes the mistake of stealing from Dr. Blakk, Eli is the only one who can protect her from The Gentleman, a suave but deadly mercenary Blakk hires to take back what was stolen from him - and bring back the scalp of the girl who stole it!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Lumino cavern is under attack! A swarm of Neurotox ghoul slugs have created a massive toxic cloud that's attacking the residents. The Shane Gang must brave an inescapable maze called the Cavern of Time to locate Blite, the only man who knows enough about regular Neotox slugs to help them stop the cloud created by the ghouls. Just a few problems with that plan: Blite is a deadly maniac, whose reign of terror ended only after Will Shane trapped him in the Cavern of Time.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Eli and the Shane Gang find themselves trapped in the Deep Caverns underneath Slugterra they discover a whole new type of danger threatening to escape. Allowing it past the barrier would mean unprecedented peril - not only for Slugterra, but our world above too!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Armed with his powerful new weapon the Gatling Blaster, Blakk's unstoppable battle train threatens to run roughshod over all of Slugterra - unless Eli can master his new Double Barrel Blaster and come up with a powerful fusion move in time to stop it.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang find themselves competing in the Slugball Championship - a rough and tumble cross between hockey, slugslinging and rugby - with deadly random obstacles thrown in for fun! Eli suspects the rival team is cheating, but he's going to have to prove it first... that is if he can survive the game!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang's been captured by the zombifying Mr. Saturday! Locked up in Stalagmite 17, they are helpless as Dr. Blakk begins the trip there to collect them. Only one hope remains... the two members of the Shane Gang Saturday didn't capture: Pronto and Burpy. Can this mismatched pair pull off an impressive prison break?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang follow Diablos Nacho to Molemound - the Molenoid home cavern. Pronto doesn't want to go - and not because he's in trouble. It turns out Pronto is the rightful KING of the Molenoids. He's been ducking the crown for years since the king's main responsibility is settling arguments and fixing leaky plumbing. But Pronto must play king for a day while the Shane Gang follows Nacho into the great Molenoid library to stop him from taking a valuable map.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Our heroes are lured into an elaborate game by a twisted villain calling himself the Game Master. The Shane Gang must use every bit of skill they have to pass each level, but there is a devious twist: every slug they fire is captured, with the promise that they'll see them again only if they manage to make it to the end. That's becoming all the more difficult with fewer and fewer slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Burpy is sick, and the only thing that will cure him is a trip to the Lightwell - a mysterious, hidden power source only slugs (and the Shadow Clan) know the way to. Burpy can't make it on his own, so Eli vows to take him there. He convinces the Shadow Clan to point the way, but the journey is fraught with peril. Meanwhile the rest of the Shane Gang must fight side by side with the Shadow Clan when Blakk's minions attack.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has been captured! Now it's up to the Shane Gang to transport him to Stalagmite 17, the only prison that can hold him. To do so, they're going to need some serious speed. That's just what they get when we reveal Kord's new modifications to their Mecha Beasts! But will it be enough to stand up to Blakk's own newly-designed super vehicles?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While the rest of the Shane Gang defend the perimeter from the legions of Blakk Guards sent to free Dr. Blakk from prison, Eli interogates the captured villain. Surprisingly, Blakk feels like talking. He reveals where he came from, how and why he discovered ghouls and most importantly of all, Eli learns the truth about what happened to his father.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli's got a new slug recruit! But in the heat of battle, can this rookie go from frightened novice to the hero of the day?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has succeeded in creating a gap in the magical slug-energy barrier that protects Slugterra, opening the way for the evil Darkbane to tunnel their way up from the Deep Caverns. Eli and the Shane gang must stop this at any cost. Now armed with a selection of upgraded slugs, blasters and armor, they take the battle to Dr. Blakk's front door. While his team slugs it out against Dr. Blakk's minions, Eli takes on Blakk himself once and for all!

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos: Heriberto
programme.desc: Heriberto quiere vengarse de Ignacio. Chema busca la ayuda de Elsa para conseguir que Tijeras salga de la cárcel. Heriberto toma una decisión que cambia su vida: dejar el negocio.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Ricardo le propone a Aníbal que declare contra Antonia, pero este se niega por miedo. Alejandro le pide a Antonia que confiese todo. Verónica le dice a Chacón que ella es Gabriela Suárez.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Aníbal delata a Antonia, conmovido por la grabación que le mostró Verónica. Antonia le ofrece una gran suma a Macario para que asesine a Verónica. Alejandro le recuerda a Verónica que la ama.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Llueven las denuncias contra Antonia Guerra. Ella intenta escapar del pueblo. Aníbal recibe la pena máxima y una vez en la celda, Verónica le revela su identidad. Macario secuestra a Alejandro.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.sub-title: Max da su apellido a Rodrigo
programme.desc: Eliza y Max dan un paso adelante en los trámites legales para unir a la familia. Pastrana borra parte del video que compromete a Julián en el accidente con Raquel. Lorena conoce a Sofía.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Alondra acepta mudarse con Ernesto y Julián. Piensa que solo así puede saber la verdad sobre sus padres. Ordenan la deportación de Raquel.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.desc: Nachito convence a Albeiro de que Catalina es el amor de su vida. Hernán Darío es aceptado en la familia. El Titi visita a Marcial en el hospital. Inhabilitado, el excapo renuncia a la vida.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.desc: Los Marín, Jota, Vanessa y Valentina unen fuerzas para destapar la tumba de la Diabla y constatar que se trata de Yésica Beltrán. Daniela muere de celos al ver a Nacho y a Catalina besándose.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Negocio a blanco y negro El campeón
programme.desc: Carla tiene una práctica racista en su night club y su esposo no está de acuerdo. El hermano de Many es boxeador y sufrió una lesión. A escondidas, acuerda una pelea que puede costarle la vida.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Entre caballeros Orina de pie para que no te violen
programme.desc: Juan Carlos y Ernesto vienen como caballeros a pedir que cada cual acate la elección de la mujer que aman. Las camareras de un bar han ideado un sistema para evitar los abusos sexuales.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Mientras Olga cuidaba a su padre, su hermana Glory administraba la empresa familiar, pero pronto la arruinó. La hija de Mónica se puso siliconas y la anestesia le causó una reacción mortal.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Dercy contrata los servicios de una empresa que ofrece servicios eróticos, pero cuando su amiga es obligada a participar en un acto sexual sin su consentimiento, Dercy interpone una demanda contra la empresa por violación.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Carolina descubrió que la graban en la intimidad con la cámara del bebé. Paola quiere regresar a Venezuela con su hija, pero el padre cree que la niña debe ser revisada por médicos en EE. UU.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: La abuela del prank Quince años ausente
programme.desc: Gendrix quiere cuidar a su abuela porque hace bromas y bailes con ella que luego sube a internet y logra miles de vistas. Un joven encuentra a su verdadera madre tras quince años de secuestro.

programme.desc: Una disminución en las poblaciones de insectos podría devastar toda la vida en la tierra. ¿Qué la causa y se puede hacer algo para detenerla?

programme.desc: La Navidad está llena de símbolos naturales. No hay animal más icónico que el reno, ni una Navidad completa sin un petirrojo europeo

programme.desc: Ve detrás de cámaras del cine de vida salvaje y únete a Andy Casagrande, mientras se acerca y conecta con algunos tiburones icónicos

programme.desc: La bióloga marina Dra. Sylvia Earle revela por qué la contaminación de los océanos y la sobrepesca podrían tener un impacto devastador

programme.title: El Poder del Sonido
programme.desc: Descubre los superpoderes de los perritos de las praderas, monos aulladores y serpientes cascabel y cómo usan el sonido para protegerse.

programme.title: Reino Unido Oculto
programme.desc: El Reino Unido tiene lugares salvajes sorprendentemente ricos y diversos, y vida silvestre oculta a la vista a menos que la busques.

programme.desc: En este episodio, exploramos cómo todos los animales, incluido el humano, tienen un sentido del ritmo, como el ciclo circadiano de 24 horas

programme.desc: Aunque la vida comenzó en los océanos, los humanos ahora dependen de la tecnología para navegar, como peces fuera del agua, pero al revés

programme.desc: Los animales voladores navegan, encuentran pareja, comida y evitan depredadores. Vivir en el aire requiere sentidos únicos adaptados al vuelo

programme.desc: Desde las civilizaciones más antiguas, los humanos han necesitado muros para protegerse.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.desc: Diana es una chica que se lastima a sí misma para llamar la atención y sentir un alivio ante los problemas que existen en su casa. Diana se enamora de Adrián, un nuevo compañero de la escuela pero provoca los celos de Rebeca, su mejor amiga.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven se dedica a vender drogas en su escuela, un profesor se entera y lo denuncia. El joven les cuenta a los hombres que le venden la droga sobre su profesor y ellos lo golpean hasta dejarlo inconsciente.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Rogelio, un hombre comprometido con su novia, se reencuentra con Susana, su primer amor. Después de dudar y estar en una incertidumbre, se ve con Nadia y platican sobre el añorado primer amor que vivieron, dejando en claro sus sentimientos.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un hombre mayor vende y empeña algunas de sus pertenencias valiosas. El hombre no es muy bondadoso y su desprecio hacia la gente hace que nadie lo quiera.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Don Tomás y su esposa Lupe están por inaugurar su cafetería, mientras eligen el nombre que llevará, ella sufre un desmayo y la llevan al hospital. Lupe muere y después de un triste funeral, los hijos de Don Tomás deciden con quién se quedará.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los jueces imitan a otros artistas y los pequeños cantan a dúo con ellos.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los equipos cantan a dúo con Bianca, María José, Fanny Lu y Edith Márquez. Rogelio, el capitán de Mega Estrellas, personifica a Jo-Jo-Jorgito Falcón.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los bailarines de cada escuadrón hacen espectaculares bailes junto a Bianca, María José y Raquel. El cantante de cada equipo le canta a un ser querido.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los Irresistibles son el primer escuadrón en pasar a la semifinal. El grupo Megabait presenta su primer video musical.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La muerte de la soldado Vanessa Guillén ha provocado un movimiento nacional para hablar sobre un tema incómodo, la violencia sexual contra las mujeres en las fuerzas armadas dutrante años, los abusos contra ellas han sido una epidemia sin control.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Juan Morales, cansado de estar confinado en una silla de ruedas, decidió desafiar sus límites y se convirtió en el distribuidor de drogas de su escuela. Envuelto en la violencia callejera, Juan logró salir adelante para volverse un psicólogo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El tiempo parece moverse en cámara lenta para familiares, amigos y conocidos de personas que han sido víctimas de diferentes crímenes que, desgraciadamente, muchas veces no logran ser resueltos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Poco a poco el ser humano termina con el planeta que habita, hoy, el plástico es uno de los mayores enemigos, no se degrada, no desaparece y ahora llena los mares, amenazando su flora y fauna sin control.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Ante la incompetencia de las autoridades, muchos familiares se han convertido en investigadores privados aficionados dispuestos a enfrentar riesgos. Ellos dicen vivir una carrera contra el tiempo para evitar que sus seres queridos desaparezcan.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una banda de asaltantes con armas de juguete se llevó casi veinte millones de dólares de las cajillas de seguridad de un banco, lo sorprendente es que no hubo heridos ni disparos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Un hombre habla sobre el infierno que vivió con la desaparición de su esposa, pues no solo sufría por ella al no saber donde estaba, también tuvo que lidiar con el hecho de que se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Frontera: las rutas de la crisis
programme.desc: Una avalancha de inmigrantes abarrota la frontera y pone a prueba la capacidad del gobierno para manejar una nueva crisis humanitaria, la tensión entre ciudades fronterizas crece.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Paco de Lucía
programme.sub-title: Germeringer Jazztage: Paco de Lucía & Group
programme.desc: This broadcast shows a rare appearance at the 1996 Germeringer Jazztage by the legendary flamenco guitarist Paco de Lucía and his sextet. Some may question the inclusion of a flamenco guitarist within a jazz festival. However, the similarities between flamenco and blues have been well documented: both are the outlet for a poor, disenfranchised minority, with a primitive strength, boundless capabilities for improvisation and a requirement for breathtaking virtuosity - all qualities shown by Paco de Lucía in this performance. Moreover, he has long been experimenting with jazz forms (evident even from his inclusion of bass, drums, and saxophone in his sextet), while still retaining the essence of the flamenco tradition. In his own words: “What I have tried to do is have a hand holding onto tradition and the other scratching, digging in other places trying to find new things I can bring into flamenco”.

programme.title: Bill Evans
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Keith Jarrett
programme.desc: Lugano Estival Jazz is an annual open-air music festival that takes place over five days at the picturesque city of Lugano, Switzerland. Since 1979, this musical Mecca has been a must-attend event for all jazz and world music fans worldwide. On July 3, 1986, American pianist and composer Keith Jarrett is joined by bassist Gary Peacock and drummer Jack DeJohnette at Estival Jazz Lugano. Known as the Standards Trio, they put on an enthralling performance that shows these master musicians at their best.

programme.title: Christian McBride
programme.sub-title: Josh Evans - Ballad Of Ernie Washington
programme.desc: On July 20, 2018, double bassist Christian McBride presented his band ‘New Jawn' at the Malta Jazz Festival. A five-time Grammy winner, McBride is one of the most requested, most recorded, and most respected figures in the music world today. Hailing from Philadelphia, this music luminary combines jazz, R&B, pop/rock, hip hop/neo-soul, and classical. Gracing the Malta Jazz stage with him are Nasheet Waits (drums), Marcus Strickland (tenor sax), and Josh Evans (trumpet).

programme.title: Astrud Gilberto, Marcelo Gilberto, David Sacks & Gil Goldstein
programme.sub-title: Astrud Gilberto Band Live at Estival Lugano 1985
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. “The Girl From Ipanema”, Astrud Gilberto's second name. The Brazilian bossa-nova and samba singer gives an outstanding, swinging performance at Estival Lugano. The band features Marcello Gilberto, David Sacks, Gil Goldstein, and Eduardo da Fonseca. Astrud started to record her own compositions in the '70s. She has recorded songs in Portuguese, English, Spanish, Italian, French, German, and Japanese.

programme.title: Dizzy Gillespie, Tony Coe, Derek Humble & Billy Mitchell
programme.desc: American jazz trumpeter, composer, and bandleader Dizzy Gillespie (1917-1993) was one of the seminal figures of the bebop movement. He fuses all musical forms rooted in African culture, such as music from Cuba, Latin America and the Caribbean, into his music. On November 4, 1970 he played a concert in Denmark with the Kenny Clarke/Francy Boland Big Band, performing Con Alma, Brother K, Now Hear My Meanin', Manteca, Let Me Outta Here, and Things Are Here.

programme.title: Sammy Davis Jr
programme.desc: The Royal Concertgebouw in Amsterdam is a world-renowned concert hall, known for its first-rate acoustics. It has attracted many famous performers over the years and is one of the Netherlands' most treasured musical institutions. On May 28, 1967, American singer and actor Sammy Davis Jr. appeared at the Concertgebouw in Amsterdam for a live, nationwide TV broadcast. Supported by his band conducted by George Rhodes, Davis Jr. combined his singing talent and infectious sense of humor as he covered songs from a variety of genres.

programme.title: Rahsaan Roland Kirk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Tord Gustavsen, Bugge Wesseltoft & Jaga Jazzist
programme.desc: Jazzed Out proves that a jazz session can take place anywhere. Unusual locations, such as garage buildings, multi-storey car parks, street corners, subway trains, and parks, in several of the world's metropoles, provide the setting for brief jazz performances. The sheer rawness of the metropoles merge with the musical creations of various artists in search of the perfect ‘urban stage'. In this episode, Oslo serves as a backdrop for sets by pianists Tord Gustavsen and Bugge Wesseltoft, as well as Jaga Jazzist collective.

programme.title: Václav Luks & Collegium 1704
programme.desc: J. S. Bach's six Brandenburg Concerto's belong to his best-known works. The composer wrote these concertos between 1711 and 1720 and dedicated them in 1721 to Christian Ludwig, Margrave of Brandenburg. In celebration of the pieces' 300th anniversary, Czech harpsichordist and conductor Václav Luks and the renowned Baroque ensemble Collegium 1704 recorded all six Brandenburg Concertos on historical instruments in 2021. The concertos are based on the Italian concerto grosso form, in which a group of solo instruments is set against a large ensemble. Bach's Brandenburg Concertos feature remarkable combinations of solo instruments and virtuoso solos. This performance was recorded at the Hall of Mirrors in the Köthen Castle, Germany.

programme.title: Herbert Blomstedt & Gewandhausorchester Leipzig
programme.sub-title: Symphonies in D by Mozart and Voríšek
programme.desc: Conductor Herbert Blomstedt and the Gewandhausorchester take us on a musical journey to the Czech Republic in this 2020 concert from Leipzig's Gewandhaus. The program opens with Bohemian composer Jan Václav Hugo Voríšek's Symphony in D major, Op. 23 (1821). Although the composition – Voríšek's only symphony – was never performed during the composer's lifetime, it has become one of his most-performed works today. Also on the program is Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Symphony No. 38 in D major, K. 504. This work, which premiered while Mozart was visiting Prague in 1787, is often referred to as the ‘Prague Symphony'.

programme.title: Seong-Jin Cho
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, Danish National Symphony Orchestra & Emma Smith
programme.desc: One night only! Welcome to the spectacular and decadent world of The Babylon Hotel, where music pours out of every crevice like bubbling champagne. In this concert, the upper class meets the underworld in a melting pot of euphoria and extravagance, nostalgia and pleasure with a carefree sinfulness only seen in the exuberant nightlife of the 1920s around the world. The concert features iconic music from movies and series, such as The Great Gatsby, Burlesque, and Babylon Berlin. The music is performed by the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and DR Big Band under the direction of Miho Hazama. The concert also features the Moka Efti Orchestra, and singers Madame le Pustra, Emma Smith, Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, and Nikko Weidemann, as well as dancers of Sweet Burlesque. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2023.

programme.title: Bastille
programme.desc: The Reading and Leeds Festivals are a pair of annual music festivals that take place in Reading and Leeds, England. The events both happen on the bank holiday weekend in August (on Friday, Saturday, Sunday), and share the same bill (occasionally with one or two exceptions). The festival's origins date to the Beaulieu Jazz Festival (1956–1961) which became the National Jazz Festival in 1961 (The National Jazz and Blues Festival in 1963) and settled in Reading in 1971. In 1999 a second leg was added at Leeds. Featuring : Bastille.

programme.title: Milky Chance
programme.desc: The German duet is back and better than ever! Milky Chance is the success story of two school friends, Clemens Rehbein and Philipp Dausch. After a long break, 2017 marks the release of a second, long-waited, album "Blossom". And, for the public, finally the occasion to discover live these new compositions, mixing rock, folk and electro pop. With reggae vibrations that can rub shoulders with house elements, Milky Chance has one of the most singular sounds. With the presence of musicians on stage, and if we believe the listening of the new record, we can expect more electric concerts, more electronic and even more energetic than in the past!

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Paul Simon
programme.desc: During the first leg of Paul Simon's triumphant, 2011 U.S. tour, he thrilled hometown fans with a special club performance at New York City's historic Webster Hall. The show presents this iconic artist working at the peak of his artistic and creative powers in an unusually intimate setting. The 20-song, 90-minute set list was drawn from his legendary career and includes several songs that haven't been performed live in many years. "Kodachrome," "Mother and Child Reunion," "Gone At Last" and "The Obvious Child" are just some of the highlights as well as songs from Simon's most recent album, 2011's So Beautiful or So What (Hear Music/Concord Music Group) including "Dazzling Blue," "Rewrite," "The Afterlife" and the album's propulsive title track.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: James Brown
programme.desc: James Brown was an American singer, songwriter, record producer, dancer and bandleader. The founding father of funk music and a major figure of 20th century popular music and dance, he is often referred to as the "Godfather of Soul". Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of James Brown.

programme.title: Aretha Franklin
programme.desc: After a period at Columbia Records, Franklin signed to Atlantic Records in 1967, where she achieved her commercial acclaim and success with songs such as "Respect", "(You Make Me Feel Like) A Natural Woman", "Spanish Harlem" and "Think". By the end of the 1960s Franklin's chart dominance soon earned her the title Queen of Soul, while at the same time she also became a symbol of black empowerment during the Civil Rights Movement.

programme.title: Various Artists

programme.title: ABBA
programme.desc: ABBA's was an extraordinary journey through the pages of music history – it took them from throwaway Eurovision turn to highly respected pop icons. This programme provides a perfect career retrospective it looks beyond the glitz and the glamour to get to the heart of what made ABBA so special. Also included is superb footage of the band in action performing their greatest hits. Featuring highlights from: Waterloo, Mamma Mia, Knowing Me, Knowing You, Dancing Queen, Thank You For The Music, and more...

programme.title: Flying Over Fiji Islands 2
programme.desc: "Flying over Fiji Islands 2" offers a 1-hour and 42-minute journey across Fiji's majestic landscapes. Combining nature sounds with ambient music by The Cynic Project, it features smooth ground-level and aerial shots, concluding with a breathtaking real-time sunset over the sea.

programme.title: Flying Over Bermuda
programme.desc: "Flying Over Bermuda" offers an 80-minute relaxation journey above Bermuda's turquoise waters and coastlines in 4K Ultra HD. Filmed by Noel Thomas, it features sights like Horseshoe Bay and the Vixen shipwreck, with music by The Cynic Project and other artists

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Striking Abstracts S1E1 — Dive into a mesmerizing symphony of color and form with this bold abstract art collection. Immerse yourself in a journey where shapes dance, colors converse, and the music paints a cinematic soundscape occupying the space between mirage and reality.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Striking Abstracts S1E2: Cinematice Dimensions — Immerse yourself in a visual journey where shapes dance and colors converse, inviting you to redefine the way you perceive art. Dare to experience the extraordinary with soft and deep house beats.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E11: Shades Of Brown — Celebrate the rich and earthy palette of brown. From warm sepia tones to deep siennas, the artwork evoke a sense of grounded elegance and rustic charm, exploring the diverse emotions and textures of this versatile color.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color: Shades of Red (S1E3) — Explore a vibrant, passionate art collection where the color red takes center stage. The works showcase red's emotive power, from fiery abstract paintings to crimson-hued photographs, offering a visual journey through the spectrum of human emotions.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E1: Shades Of Blue — Delve into the captivating world of blue and its soothing, tranquil essence. Through a masterful interplay of tones and textures, each piece evokes a profound sense of serenity, depth, & contemplation. Immerse yourself in a journey of introspection.

programme.title: A Mother's Heart
programme.desc: A Mother's Heart S1E1 — Celebrating the unwavering love and devotion of mothers everywhere. From delicate watercolors to bold photographs and colorful paintings, each piece captures the essence of maternal grace and strength.
